scope: balance/rebalance/monitor cohort frontmatter and eval-visibility audit
learner_facing_quality_improvement: This wave narrows learner-facing monitor and rebalance blind spots by separating docs that are already retrieval-visible from docs that still lack v3 graph admission, so the next queue can fix the right bottleneck instead of re-editing safe content.

verification.frontmatter_scan_command: python - <<'PY' ... filename contains balance|rebalance|monitor, excluding Pilot lock ... PY
verification.lint_probe_result: all five frontmatter-missing docs currently pass the H1-first authoring lint, while all three frontmatter-present docs fail with `first non-empty line must be an H1 (`# ...`)`
verification.retrieval_probe_result: path-level eval visibility is concentrated in `semaphore-monitor-basics` and `load-balancer-drain-and-affinity-primer`; the remaining six docs have little or no direct eval-path presence, so observability coverage is more uneven than raw content count suggests

priority_non_pilot_targets.target_query_shape: 세마포어랑 모니터 차이 뭐예요, monitor 뭐예요, synchronized랑 semaphore 언제 달라요
priority_non_pilot_targets.why_now: It is a beginner operating-system gap doc with confirmed retrieval visibility, so attaching v3 metadata should improve first-hit routing with low conceptual risk.

priority_non_pilot_targets.target_query_shape: rebalance는 왜 hot path가 아니에요, striped guard row refill 뭐예요, bucket budget을 언제 옮겨요
priority_non_pilot_targets.why_now: It fills a beginner database balance gap and already has concrete symptom phrasing plus safe related-doc links.

priority_non_pilot_targets.target_query_shape: balanced bst 뭐예요, 왜 bst가 한쪽으로 기울어요, treemap이 왜 log n이에요
priority_non_pilot_targets.why_now: It is lint-clean, beginner-oriented, and can turn common ordered-map questions into a stronger data-structure entrypoint without any Pilot overlap.

guardrails: No Pilot-locked corpus file was modified.
No corpus doc was edited because this QA wave only recorded balance-monitor readiness and the current frontmatter/H1 conflict.
No out-of-scope script or test change was attempted in this lane.
